title: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control
description: On pages 9–12, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9. The central beat is the enemy tries to regain control.
scene: The scene focuses on the enemy tries to regain control, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Take a look. It was definitely here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The "Artificial Devil Fruit" that vegapunk made.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I heard it was a failure, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: In short, I truly am human.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: So that I may tell the children!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Not one will be left alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's the very nature of experiments

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: to have a few unavoidable victims...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: They always follow through!! So don't worry!!

summary: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
